" of " +

" " +
{[.]Units of Measure}

Description
tags.value: Scale Controller Configured Units of Measure

tags.name: Description

eventScripts.script:
# Set up a logger.
	logger = system.util.getLogger("tag." + tagPath.replace('/', '.'))

	# Only Run Script if the tag value is good!
	if currentValue.quality.toString() == 'Good':
	
		if currentValue.value != previousValue.value:
		
			now = system.date.now()
		
			# Read the Value Map dataset
			readPaths = [
				"[.]Enumeration",
				"[.]Value"
				]
		
			tags = system.tag.readBlocking(readPaths)
			valueMap = tags[0].value
			actualValue = tags[1].value
			
			# Sort the dataset by the "Value" column (index 1)
			sortedvalueMap = system.dataset.sort(valueMap, 0, False)
		
			string = "Value Error"
			# Iterate through the dataset and find the corresponding range
			for row in range(sortedvalueMap.getRowCount()):
				if actualValue >= sortedvalueMap.getValueAt(row, 0):
					string = sortedvalueMap.getValueAt(row, 1)
					break
		
			# Write the new values to the tags.
			writePaths = [
				"[.]String",
				"[.]Duration/Last Changed On",
				]
			writeValues = [
				string,
				now,
				]
			
			system.tag.writeBlocking(writePaths, writeValues)
	
	# If the tags value is bad, log it.
	else:
		logger.info(currentValue.quality.toString())

# Set up a logger.
	logger = system.util.getLogger("tag." + tagPath.replace('/', '.'))

	# Only Run Script if the tag value is good!
	if currentValue.quality.toString() == 'Good':
	
		if currentValue.value != previousValue.value:
		
			now = system.date.now()
		
			# Read the Value Map dataset
			readPaths = [
				"[.]Enumeration",
				"[.]Value"
				]
		
			tags = system.tag.readBlocking(readPaths)
			valueMap = tags[0].value
			actualValue = tags[1].value
			
			# Sort the dataset by the "Value" column (index 1)
			sortedvalueMap = system.dataset.sort(valueMap, 0, False)
		
			string = "Value Error"
			# Iterate through the dataset and find the corresponding range
			for row in range(sortedvalueMap.getRowCount()):
				if actualValue >= sortedvalueMap.getValueAt(row, 0):
					string = sortedvalueMap.getValueAt(row, 1)
					break
		
			# Write the new values to the tags.
			writePaths = [
				"[.]String",
				"[.]Duration/Last Changed On",
				]
			writeValues = [
				string,
				now,
				]
			
			system.tag.writeBlocking(writePaths, writeValues)
	
	# If the tags value is bad, log it.
	else:
		logger.info(currentValue.quality.toString())

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	
	temperature = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) * 0.1
	
	if int(dataValue[0], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) - 65536
		temperature = (rawValue * 0.1) 
	
	tempC = temperature
	tempF = (temperature * 9/5) + 32
	
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/TemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureF" % topTagPath], [tempC, tempF])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
		
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	out2 = outputs & 0b0010 == 0b0010
	
	flowvelocity = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) * 0.01
	
	pipediameter = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/PipeDiameter" % topTagPath])[0].value
	flowrate = (0.25 * 3.14159 * flowvelocity * (pipediameter * pipediameter) * 60 * 7.48052) /144
	
	temperature = int(dataValue[4:8], 16) /40
	
	if int(dataValue[4], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = (int(dataValue[4:8], 16) - 65536)
		temperature = rawValue / 40
	
	tempC = (temperature -32) * 5/9
	tempF = temperature
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/TemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureF" % topTagPath, "%s/FlowVelocity" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath, "%s/Out2" % topTagPath, "%s/FlowRate" % topTagPath], [tempC, tempF, flowvelocity, out1, out2, flowrate])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
		
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	out2 = outputs & 0b0010 == 0b0010
	
	flow = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) * 1
	temperature = int(dataValue[4:8], 16) /4
	
	if int(dataValue[4], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = (int(dataValue[4:8], 16) - 65536)
		temperature = rawValue / 40
	
	tempC = temperature
	tempF = (temperature* 9/5) +32
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/TemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureF" % topTagPath, "%s/Flow" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath, "%s/Out2" % topTagPath], [tempC, tempF, flow, out1, out2])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	out2 = outputs & 0b0010 == 0b0010
	
	scaleLevelValue = int(dataValue[4:6], 16) - 256
	scaleLevel = 10 ** scaleLevelValue
	
	level = int(dataValue[0:4], 16)  
	level = level * scaleLevel
	
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Level" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath, "%s/Out2" % topTagPath], [level, out1, out2])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	
	gradient = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/Gradient" % topTagPath])[0].value
	pressure = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) * gradient
	
	if int(dataValue[0], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) - 65536
		pressure = (rawValue * gradient) 

	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Pressure" % topTagPath], [pressure])

def doInBackground():
		import traceback
		topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
		tagValues = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Hostname" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/XPort" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/VendorId" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/IsStale" % topTagPath])
		running = tagValues[0].value
		hostname = tagValues[1].value
		xport = tagValues[2].value
		vendorId = tagValues[3].value
		isStale = tagValues[4].value
		
		if not running:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath], [True])
		
			error = None	
			try:
				url = hostname
				
				# Get device info if not set
				if vendorId is None:
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/vendorid/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					vendorId = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/deviceid/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					deviceId = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/productname/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					productName = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/serial/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					serial = res["data"]["value"]
					
					system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/DeviceInfo/VendorId" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/DeviceId" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/ProductName" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/Serial" % topTagPath], [vendorId, deviceId, productName, serial])
				
				postData = {
					"code":"request",
					"cid":-1,
					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/status/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				status = res["data"]["value"]
				
				postData = {
				  "code": "request",
				  "cid": 1,
				  "adr": "/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/iolreadacyclic" % xport,
				  "data": {
				    "index": 536,
				    "subindex": 0
				  }
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				tempC = int(res["data"]["value"],16)*0.1
				tempF = (tempC * 9/5.0) + 32
				
				postData = {
					"code":"request",
					"cid":-1,
					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/pdin/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				dataValue = res["data"]["value"]
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/PDIN" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureF" % topTagPath], [status, dataValue, tempC, tempF])
				
			except:
				postData = {
								"code":"request",
								"cid":-1,
								"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/status/getdata" % xport
							}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				status = res["data"]["value"]
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath], [status])
				error = traceback.format_exc()
				
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Status" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Error" % topTagPath], [False, "failed" if error is not None else "success", error])
			
			if error is None:
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/LastExecution" % topTagPath], [system.date.now()])
				
		elif running and isStale:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath], [False])
				
	system.util.invokeAsynchronous(doInBackground)

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	out2 = outputs & 0b0010 == 0b0010
	
	gradient = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/Gradient" % topTagPath])[0].value
	pressure = (int(dataValue[0:4], 16) / 4.0) 
	pressure = pressure * gradient
	
	if int(dataValue[0], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) - 65536
		pressure = (rawValue /4.0) * gradient
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Pressure" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath, "%s/Out2" % topTagPath], [pressure, out1, out2])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	
	conductivity = int(dataValue[0:8], 16) * 1
	temperature = (int(dataValue[12:20], 16) * 0.18) + 32
	
	if int(dataValue[12], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[12:20], 16) - 65536
		temperature = (rawValue * 0.18) + 32
	
	tempC = (temperature -32) * 5/9
	tempF = temperature
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/TemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureF" % topTagPath, "%s/Conductivity" % topTagPath], [tempC, tempF, conductivity])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	out2 = outputs & 0b0010 == 0b0010
	
	sensitivity = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) / 4.0
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Sensitivity" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath, "%s/Out2" % topTagPath], [sensitivity, out1, out2])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	
	#Temperature
	temperature = (int(dataValue[0:4], 16) * 0.018) + 32
	
	if int(dataValue[0], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) - 65536
		temperature = (rawValue * 0.018) + 32
	
	tempC = (temperature -32) * 5/9
	tempF = temperature
	
	#Reference Temperature
	referenceTemperature = (int(dataValue[8:12], 16) * 0.018) + 32
	
	if int(dataValue[8], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[16:20], 16) - 65536
		referenceTemperature = (rawValue * 0.018) + 32
	
	referenceTempC = (temperature -32) * 5/9
	referenceTempF = referenceTemperature
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/TemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureF" % topTagPath, "%s/ReferenceTemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/ReferenceTemperatureF" % topTagPath], [tempC, tempF, referenceTempC, referenceTempF])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001

	
	capacitance = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) /2  #%
	
	
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Capacitance" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath], [capacitance, out1])

def doInBackground():
		import traceback
		topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
		tagValues = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Hostname" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/XPort" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/VendorId" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/IsStale" % topTagPath])
		running = tagValues[0].value
		hostname = tagValues[1].value
		xport = tagValues[2].value
		vendorId = tagValues[3].value
		isStale = tagValues[4].value
		
		if not running:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath], [True])
		
			error = None	
			try:
				url = hostname
				
				# Get device info if not set
				if vendorId is None:
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/vendorid/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					vendorId = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/deviceid/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					deviceId = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/productname/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					productName = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/serial/getdata" % xport
					}
#					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
#					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
#					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
#					serial = res["data"]["value"]
					
					system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/DeviceInfo/VendorId" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/DeviceId" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/ProductName" % topTagPath], [vendorId, deviceId, productName])
				
				postData = {
					"code":"request",
					"cid":-1,
					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/status/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				status = res["data"]["value"]
				
				postData = {
				  "code": "request",
				  "cid": 1,
				  "adr": "/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/iolreadacyclic" % xport,
				  "data": {
				    "index": 536,
				    "subindex": 0
				  }
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				
				postData = {
					"code":"request",
					"cid":-1,
					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/pdin/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				dataValue = res["data"]["value"]
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/PDIN" % topTagPath], [status, dataValue])
				
			except:
				postData = {
								"code":"request",
								"cid":-1,
								"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/status/getdata" % xport
							}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				status = res["data"]["value"]
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath], [status])
				error = traceback.format_exc()
				
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Status" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Error" % topTagPath], [False, "failed" if error is not None else "success", error])
			
			if error is None:
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/LastExecution" % topTagPath], [system.date.now()])
				
		elif running and isStale:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath], [False])
				
	system.util.invokeAsynchronous(doInBackground)

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	out2 = outputs & 0b0010 == 0b0010

	vrms = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) * 0.1
	aPeak = int(dataValue[8:12], 16) * 10.1971621297793
	arms = int(dataValue[16:20], 16) * 10.1971621297793
	temperature = (int(dataValue[24:28], 16) * 0.18) + 32
	crest = int(dataValue[32:36], 16) * 0.1
	deviceStatus = int(dataValue[38:39], 16)
	
	if int(dataValue[24], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[24:28], 16) - 65536
		temperature = rawValue * 0.18 + 32
	
	tempC = (temperature -32) * 5/9
	tempF = temperature
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/TemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureF" % topTagPath, "%s/VRMS" % topTagPath, "%s/APeak" % topTagPath, "%s/ARMS" % topTagPath, "%s/Crest" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath, "%s/Out2" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceStatus" % topTagPath], [tempC, tempF, vrms, aPeak, arms, crest, out1, out2, deviceStatus])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	
	temperature = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) * 0.1
	
	if int(dataValue[0], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) - 65536
		temperature = (rawValue * 0.1) 
	
	tempC = (temperature -32) * 5/9
	tempF = temperature
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/TemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureF" % topTagPath], [tempC, tempF])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	
	gradient = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/Gradient" % topTagPath])[0].value
	pressure = (int(dataValue[0:4], 16) / 4.0) 
	pressure = pressure * gradient
	
	if int(dataValue[0], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) - 65536
		pressure = (rawValue /4.0) * gradient
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Pressure" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath], [pressure, out1])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	
	conductivity = int(dataValue[0:8], 16) * 1
	temperature = (int(dataValue[12:20], 16) * 0.18) + 32
	
	if int(dataValue[12], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[12:20], 16) - 65536
		temperature = (rawValue * 0.18) + 32
	
	tempC = (temperature -32) * 5/9
	tempF = temperature
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/TemperatureC" % topTagPath, "%s/TemperatureF" % topTagPath, "%s/Conductivity" % topTagPath], [tempC, tempF, conductivity])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	out2 = outputs & 0b0010 == 0b0010
	
	gradient = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/Gradient" % topTagPath])[0].value
	pressure = (int(dataValue[0:4], 16) / 4.0) 
	pressure = pressure * gradient
	
	if int(dataValue[0], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) - 65536
		pressure = (rawValue /4.0) * gradient
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Pressure" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath, "%s/Out2" % topTagPath], [pressure, out1, out2])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])

		rawPressureValue = int(dataValue[24:28], 16) - 65536
		realpressure = rawPressureValue * 0.145038
		
	pressure = realpressure
	tempC = (temperature -32) * 5/9
	tempF = temperature

def doInBackground():
		import traceback
		topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
		tagValues = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Hostname" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/XPort" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/VendorId" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/IsStale" % topTagPath])
		running = tagValues[0].value
		hostname = tagValues[1].value
		xport = tagValues[2].value
		vendorId = tagValues[3].value
		isStale = tagValues[4].value
		
		if not running:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath], [True])
		
			error = None	
			try:
				url = hostname
				
				# Get device info if not set
				if vendorId is None:
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/vendorid/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					vendorId = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/deviceid/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					deviceId = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/productname/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					productName = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/serial/getdata" % xport
					}
#					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
#					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
#					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
#					serial = res["data"]["value"]
					
					system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/DeviceInfo/VendorId" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/DeviceId" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/ProductName" % topTagPath], [vendorId, deviceId, productName])
				
				postData = {
					"code":"request",
					"cid":-1,
					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/status/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				status = res["data"]["value"]
				
				postData = {
				  "code": "request",
				  "cid": 1,
				  "adr": "/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/iolreadacyclic" % xport,
				  "data": {
				    "index": 536,
				    "subindex": 0
				  }
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				
				postData = {
					"code":"request",
					"cid":-1,
					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/pdin/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				dataValue = res["data"]["value"]
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/PDIN" % topTagPath], [status, dataValue])
				
			except:
				postData = {
								"code":"request",
								"cid":-1,
								"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/status/getdata" % xport
							}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				status = res["data"]["value"]
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath], [status])
				error = traceback.format_exc()
				
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Status" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Error" % topTagPath], [False, "failed" if error is not None else "success", error])
			
			if error is None:
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/LastExecution" % topTagPath], [system.date.now()])
				
		elif running and isStale:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath], [False])
				
	system.util.invokeAsynchronous(doInBackground)

					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/pdin/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				dataValue = res["data"]["value"]
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/PDIN" % topTagPath], [status, dataValue])
			
			except:
				postData = {
					"code":"request",
					"cid":-1,
					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/status/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				status = res["data"]["value"]
	
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath], [status])
				error = traceback.format_exc()
			
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Status" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Error" % topTagPath], [False, "failed" if error is not None else "success", error])
			
			if error is None:
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/LastExecution" % topTagPath], [system.date.now()])
				
		elif running and isStale:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath], [False])
				
	system.util.invokeAsynchronous(doInBackground)

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	out2 = outputs & 0b0010 == 0b0010
	
	level = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) 
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Level" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath, "%s/Out2" % topTagPath], [level, out1, out2])

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	
	distance = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) / 16 #cm
	 

	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Distance" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath], [distance, out1])

def doInBackground():
		import traceback
		topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
		tagValues = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Hostname" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/XPort" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/VendorId" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/IsStale" % topTagPath])
		running = tagValues[0].value
		hostname = tagValues[1].value
		xport = tagValues[2].value
		vendorId = tagValues[3].value
		isStale = tagValues[4].value
		
		if not running:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath], [True])
		
			error = None	
			try:
				url = hostname
				
				# Get device info if not set
				if vendorId is None:
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/vendorid/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					vendorId = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/deviceid/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					deviceId = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/productname/getdata" % xport
					}
					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
					productName = res["data"]["value"]
					
					postData = {
						"code":"request",
						"cid":-1,
						"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/serial/getdata" % xport
					}
#					postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
#					res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
#					res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
#					serial = res["data"]["value"]
					
					system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/DeviceInfo/VendorId" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/DeviceId" % topTagPath, "%s/DeviceInfo/ProductName" % topTagPath], [vendorId, deviceId, productName])
				
				postData = {
					"code":"request",
					"cid":-1,
					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/status/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				status = res["data"]["value"]
				
				postData = {
				  "code": "request",
				  "cid": 1,
				  "adr": "/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/iolreadacyclic" % xport,
				  "data": {
				    "index": 536,
				    "subindex": 0
				  }
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				
				postData = {
					"code":"request",
					"cid":-1,
					"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/pdin/getdata" % xport
				}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				dataValue = res["data"]["value"]
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/PDIN" % topTagPath], [status, dataValue])
				
			except:
				postData = {
								"code":"request",
								"cid":-1,
								"adr":"/iolinkmaster/port[%s]/iolinkdevice/status/getdata" % xport
							}
				postData = system.util.jsonEncode(postData)
				res = system.net.httpPost(url=url, contentType="application/json", postData=postData)
				res = system.util.jsonDecode(res)
				status = res["data"]["value"]
				
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/PortStatus" % topTagPath], [status])
				error = traceback.format_exc()
				
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Status" % topTagPath, "%s/Poll/Error" % topTagPath], [False, "failed" if error is not None else "success", error])
			
			if error is None:
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/LastExecution" % topTagPath], [system.date.now()])
				
		elif running and isStale:
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Poll/Running" % topTagPath], [False])
				
	system.util.invokeAsynchronous(doInBackground)

topTagPath = "/".join(tagPath.split("/")[:-2])
	dataValue = currentValue.value
	outputs = dataValue[-1]
	outputs = int(outputs, 16)
	
	out1 = outputs & 0b0001 == 0b0001
	out2 = outputs & 0b0010 == 0b0010
	
	gradient = system.tag.readBlocking(["%s/Gradient" % topTagPath])[0].value
	pressure = int(dataValue[0:4], 16)  
	pressure = pressure * gradient
	
	if int(dataValue[0], 16) >= 8:
		rawValue = int(dataValue[0:4], 16) - 65536
		pressure = (rawValue) * gradient
		
	system.tag.writeBlocking(["%s/Pressure" % topTagPath, "%s/Out1" % topTagPath, "%s/Out2" % topTagPath], [pressure, out1, out2])
